tasks.title: AND-frac acoustic restoration: power steering under noise/reverb conditions
tasks.definition_of_done: Apply power steering at L* on noisy/reverb samples from Q200; test if steering restores AND-frac sharpness; CPU <5min; proves L* as robustification target

tasks.title: AND-frac conformal prediction for ASR uncertainty quantification
tasks.definition_of_done: AND-frac at L* as conformal nonconformity score; empirical coverage on LibriSpeech calibration set; compare vs temperature scaling; CPU <5min

tasks.title: Audio-RAVEL: Cause/Isolate two-score for AND-frac interventions at L*
tasks.definition_of_done: Adapt RAVEL two-score: Cause=steering changes target token; Isolate=no bleed to non-target; report (Cause,Isolate) pair on 100 LibriSpeech samples; CPU <5min

tasks.title: Censored behavior x AND-frac: refusal vs commit mechanism in GPT-2-small
tasks.definition_of_done: Fine-tune GPT-2-small to refuse 10 patterns; compare AND-frac at L* for refused vs accepted; is commit suppressed for censored topics? CPU <5min

tasks.title: Power steering for hallucination suppression: WER improvement on L2-ARCTIC
tasks.definition_of_done: Jacobian SV steering at L* to suppress hallucinations; WER improvement vs baseline and temperature scaling on 60 samples; CPU <5min

tasks.title: AND-frac streaming monitor: real-time commitment detection on partial audio
tasks.definition_of_done: Compute AND-frac on sliding audio windows; detect commit-state onset; report latency in ms; AUROC >0.75 on partial vs full window comparison; CPU <5min

tasks.title: SPIRIT-style linear erasing at L* for audio jailbreak defense
tasks.definition_of_done: Adapt SPIRIT erasing method at L*: subtract jailbreak direction from activations; measure AND-frac restoration and jailbreak suppression rate on JALMBench-v0; CPU <5min

tasks.title: AND-frac circuit dissection: Q/K/V head roles at L* (commitment vs feature heads)
tasks.definition_of_done: Classify attention heads at L* by AND-frac contribution: score each head via ablation; identify top-3 commitment heads; compare to feature-extraction heads on lower layers; CPU <5min

tasks.title: AND-frac regularization loss (mock): sharpness-maximizing fine-tuning signal
tasks.definition_of_done: Define AND-frac loss term maximizing L* sharpness; simulate 10 gradient steps on mock Whisper; measure AND-frac before/after vs vanilla CE; CPU <5min

tasks.title: AND-frac in CodeParrot-small: code LLM cross-modal commit pattern
tasks.definition_of_done: Compute AND-frac in CodeParrot-small on Python completions; find L* analog; compare curve shape to Q190 GPT-2 and Whisper; CPU <5min

tasks.title: AND-frac drift monitor for RLHF mock: alignment fine-tuning stability
tasks.definition_of_done: Simulate RLHF-style reward gradient steps on GPT-2; monitor AND-frac drift at L*; detect alignment collapse threshold; CPU <5min

tasks.title: AND-frac in multilingual LLM (mGPT/BLOOM-560M): cross-lingual commit layer
tasks.definition_of_done: Find L* in mGPT or BLOOM-560M; test if power steering at L* improves cross-lingual consistency; compare L*/D ratio to Whisper and GPT-2; CPU <5min

tasks.title: Build: streaming AND-frac monitor for real-time audio jailbreak detection (sliding 10s window, AUROC target >0.75)
tasks.definition_of_done: Script runs on CPU with mock Whisper activations, sliding window computes AND-frac, simulated AUROC >0.75

tasks.title: Build: AND-frac drift monitor for Whisper fine-tuning (extend RLHF mock to encoder-decoder, detect collapse at commit layer)
tasks.definition_of_done: Script monitors AND-frac per gradient step on Whisper-base mock; detects collapse event, outputs plot

tasks.title: Build: AND-frac early stopping criterion for ASR fine-tuning (stop when AND-frac drops >30% from baseline)
tasks.definition_of_done: Training loop with AND-frac early stopper; comparison WER with/without early stop on mock

tasks.title: Build: power steering at L* for accent robustness (extend Q206 WER reduction to accented speech mock)
tasks.definition_of_done: Mock accented-speech WER with/without steering; alpha sweep; AND-frac delta measured

tasks.title: Build: cross-architecture AND-frac comparison decoder-only (GPT-2) vs encoder-decoder (Whisper-base) — L*/D universality
tasks.definition_of_done: AND-frac curves for both architectures; L*/D values tabulated; interpretation written

tasks.title: Build: SPIRIT-style linear erasure at L* for audio jailbreak suppression (project out jailbreak direction, measure AND-frac restoration)
tasks.definition_of_done: Mock script: compute jailbreak direction via CAA, subtract at L*, measure AND-frac delta + jailbreak probe score

tasks.title: Experiment: censored speech in real Whisper — does AND-frac commit layer shift for sensitive content vs neutral content?
tasks.definition_of_done: Whisper-base activations on 10 sensitive vs 10 neutral prompts; AND-frac peak layer compared; results written

tasks.title: Write: cross-modal L*/D universality paper section (GPT-2=0.667, BLOOM=0.542, CodeParrot=0.500, Whisper TBD)

tasks.definition_of_done: Dataset spec written: error types, annotation schema, AND-frac features, evaluation protocol
